findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "prompt:Plan a shopping trip" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Start a guided grocery shopping trip conversation. This prompt seeds a multi-turn conversation that collects the shopping list, starting location, and travel mo…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
